title: helianthus atrorubens
intro: Helianthus atrorubens, also known as the dark red sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The aerial parts of Helianthus atrorubens can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
